notes: The agent failed to efficiently verify the patient's information, didn't reject the Sunday appointment, and didn't offer an alternative. The conversation was plagued by errors and a lack of clarity.

bugs.title: Failed to reject Sunday appointment and didn't offer alternative
bugs.evidence_quote: Just to confirm, I have your name as Maria Lopez.
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have immediately addressed the patient's request for a Sunday appointment, explained that the office is closed on weekends, and offered the next available weekday slot.
bugs.reproducibility: schedule_weekend_trap scenario: Patient requests a Sunday 10am appointment, and the agent fails to reject it and offer an alternative.

bugs.title: Poor error recovery and verification
bugs.evidence_quote: I have your last name as l o p
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should have efficiently verified the patient's information, apologized for any mistakes, and moved forward with scheduling the appointment.
bugs.reproducibility: schedule_weekend_trap scenario: Patient corrects the agent multiple times, and the agent still fails to verify the information correctly.

bugs.title: Hallucinated facts and missing verification
bugs.evidence_quote: I have your phone number is nine one six five three five eight two one one.
bugs.expected_behavior: The agent should not have provided unverified information and should have asked the patient to confirm their phone number instead.
bugs.reproducibility: schedule_weekend_trap scenario: Agent provides unverified phone number without patient confirmation.
